description_long: This is a dark, rounded bowler-style hat with a smooth, slightly matte finish and a narrow, upturned brim. The hat features a prominent looped strap or chin cord attached to one side, which is unusual for this style and suggests it may be used for secure wear or display. Faint, stenciled white text is visible on the crown and brim, including phrases like 'PRICE 3/- EACH' and other partially legible markings, giving it a vintage or utilitarian appearance. The crown is high and domed, with no visible creases or pinches, and the brim is consistent in width all around. The surface shows some subtle wear and patina, indicating age or frequent use. The overall look is utilitarian, possibly referencing historical or costume headwear.
description: A dark, vintage bowler hat with a domed crown, narrow upturned brim, and a looped strap, featuring stenciled white text for a utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the domed crown, upturned brim, and a prominent looped strap extending forward, with visible stenciled text on the crown.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the smooth, rounded profile of the crown and brim, with the strap trailing to the left and more stenciled text visible on the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous curve of the crown and brim, with minimal visible text and the strap mostly hidden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the strap extending outward and more stenciled text on the crown and brim, emphasizing the utilitarian markings.
